name: linGetWakeupLength
title: linGetWakeupLength
description: With this function it is possible to retrieve a length of an occurred Wakeup frame.

parameters.name: wakeupFrame
parameters.description: Bus-event of type LIN Wakeup frame.

return: Returns the retrieved length [in units of 10 µsec] or zero on failure.

description: Query the length of the wakeup frames
